name: ease-on
description: Ease-On Community Wellness App — Frontend + Backend

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cd backend && cp -n .env.example .env 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Setup complete. Edit backend/.env with your DB credentials, then run: npm run dev'
